response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with valuable domain knowledge in geospatial systems through his work on GISCollective. However, the role strictly requires modern C++ or Rust expertise for building high-performance routing pipelines. Bogdan's primary languages are TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with his only C++ experience dating back to 2008, making him a poor technical fit for the core requirements of this specific position.
strengths: Deep domain expertise in geospatial data processing and GIS applications (GISCollective, Green Map).
Proven experience building high-throughput, low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Strong background in automated testing, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship principles.
concerns: Lacks recent professional experience in modern C++ or Rust, which are the primary required languages for this role.
Core expertise is heavily skewed towards web technologies (Node.js, TypeScript) rather than backend data pipeline engineering in system-level languages.
No direct experience building real-time navigation guidance or routing tiling systems.
